name: GT-kitaev-spectral
source: Kitaev arXiv:2405.02434, refs/kitaev-2405.02434/approximate_algebras.tex:354-357 (and 2171-2182): construction Phi-tilde=theta(2Phi-I) via the function calculus for the Banach algebra; idempotence, unit-preservation, closeness, dagger-preservation. Canonical def-spectral-idempotent. NOTE: Kitaev works in cb-norm; our adaptation re-derives the bounds in the operator/order-unit norm.
